entry.title: Introducing Myself
entry.content:
I was an avid blogger. But something happened and I stopped - not sure why! I plan to revive my passion for blogging through this platform.

A little about me

I enjoy bringing things to life, creating things that people love to use! Challenges? Bring 'em on, because "It's possible" — that's my moto.

I am a full time "Software Guy" at 2M Companies in Dallas, TX. My Computer Science degree, coding skills, work-environment, and a passion for continuous-learning enables me to build amazing things!

Happy reading!
